headline: Is T. Rowe Price (TROW) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: Wondering if T. Rowe Price Group at US$100.24 is a fair deal, a stretch, or a potential bargain? This article breaks down the numbers so you can judge the value for yourself. The stock has returned 4.3% over the last 7 days and 13.9% over the last 30 days. Year to date it shows a 4.2% decline and a 21.9% return over the last year, putting recent strength into a broader context that investors may want to weigh carefully. Recent coverage has focused on how T. Rowe Price Group is being assessed...
